stemHtml: A non-pressurised aircraft, carrying 10 passengers, is planning a flight from Zurich (LSZH) to Innsbruck (LOWI) which will be 75 minutes long. 35 minutes are planned to be above FL100. The final cruising level will be FL130. The minimum supplemental oxygen that must be carried for the passengers only should be at least adequate for (1) _____ passenger(s) and should last for at least (2) _____ minutes.
